author: Rachel
body: Ryan Adams & The Cardinals. \[sigh\] Their music does do the same for me. These are gems…Once again, Matt…thank you thank you thank you.

author: Burgo
body:
Hi Rachel…  
Glad to hear it! No need to thank me, the fact that you appreciate the tunes is enough :P  
Have you had a chance to see them live yet?

author: Rachel
body:
I have not been able to see them live :( It’s crazy. And so sad…But THAT will be a very special day.

Thanks for the reply ;)
